title: Canada extends certain temporary special measures for Iranian Nationals - Canada.ca
content:
## Canada extends certain temporary special measures for Iranian Nationals
March 4, 2026—Ottawa — In response to the instability in Iran, Canada introduced special measures in February 2023 to offer temporary support to eligible Iranians already in the country.
As the situation in Iran remains uncertain, Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada (IRCC) is introducing a new set of targeted measures to continue supporting eligible Iranians who are already contributing to Canadian communities and the labour market. These measures allow individuals with a valid work permit, issued on or before February 28, 2025, to apply to extend it. These measures will expire March 31, 2027 and standard processing fees apply. Those looking to extend their stay as a visitor or to extend their study permit can apply under regular IRCC processes.
